and Founder

Victoria Okoh

Our Story

More Than Events.
We Create Memories.

"Blending professionalism with personal touch to deliver exceptional experiences, memories, and style."

Victoria's Touch Enterprise was founded in September 2024 as a passion-driven brand built on creativity, excellence, and service. What began as a vision to deliver quality event experiences has grown into a multifaceted creative enterprise serving clients across Abuja and Nigeria.

We specialize in event planning, bridal support, and seamless event execution — with a strong commitment to professionalism, attention to detail, and personalized delivery.

Sub-Brand under Victoria's Touch Enterprise

VT Visuals

The creative media arm of Victoria's Touch Enterprise. We capture moments, tell compelling stories and produce visual content through photography, cinematic videography and creative content creation.

Event Planning Photography Videography Content Creation Bridal Services
What We Do

Three Pillars of
Creative Excellence

01

Event Planning and Coordination

Professional end-to-end planning and execution of seamless events. From intimate gatherings to grand celebrations, we handle every detail so you simply enjoy the moment.

02

Venue Selection and Logistics

Sourcing and securing the perfect venue for your event. We handle all logistics from site visits to contracts, ensuring everything runs without a hitch.

03

Event Styling and Decor

Transforming spaces into breathtaking experiences with premium decor, floral arrangements and atmospheric styling tailored to your theme and vision.

04

Guest Management and Hospitality

Professional guest management, hostess services and VIP handling to ensure every guest feels welcomed, comfortable and well catered for.

05

Vendor Sourcing and Coordination

We connect you with the best vendors and coordinate them seamlessly so you don't have to worry about a thing on your special day.

06

Budget Planning and Administration

Transparent budget management and thorough event administration ensuring your event is delivered on time, within budget and beyond expectations.

Media Sub-Brand
VT Visuals
01

Photography

Professional photography for weddings, events, portraits and brand shoots. Every frame is crafted to tell a story worth keeping forever. From intimate ceremonies to grand celebrations.

02

Videography

Cinematic videography that captures the emotion, atmosphere and beauty of your most important moments. Highlight reels, full event coverage and cinematic films.

03

Content Creation

Engaging visual content for brands, businesses and personal brands. Social media content, promotional videos, brand campaigns and creative storytelling that converts.

Wedding Planning

Choose Your
Perfect Package

Three carefully crafted wedding packages to suit every dream and budget. All packages include our signature personal touch and dedicated coordination.

Classic Package
Classic
₦5M to ₦9M
100 to 250 Guests
  • Venue Sourcing
  • Event Planning and Coordination
  • Decor and Lighting
  • Small Chops and Drinks
  • 2-Step Wedding Cake
  • Catering (Food Varieties)
  • Content Creator
  • Photography (6-hour coverage)
  • Videography (6-hour coverage)
  • Standard DJ and MC Services
  • Hostesses for Guest Assistance
  • Security Personnel
  • Bridal Styling and Consultation

Standard Package
Premium
₦10M to ₦25M
300 to 600 Guests
  • Everything in Classic Package
  • Full Event Planning and Coordination
  • Standard Venue Decoration and Florals
  • Catering Services (Buffet Style)
  • Full-Day Photography and Photobook
  • Videography Coverage
  • MC and DJ Services
  • Standard Bridal Assistance
  • 3-Tier Wedding Cake
  • Bride and Groom Transportation
  • Customised Souvenirs for Guests
  • After-Party Coordination
  • Wedding Display and Invite Cards
  • Digital Photo and Video Album
Enquire Now
Luxury Package
Grand
₦25M to ₦50M
600 to 1000 Guests
  • Everything in Premium Package
  • Premium Venue Selection and Booking
  • Luxury Venue Decor and Custom Florals
  • High-End Catering (Multi-Course)
  • Premium DJ and Live Band Entertainment
  • Full Wedding Photography and Cinematic Video
  • VIP MC and Entertainment Services
  • Bridal and Groom Styling Consultation
  • Exclusive Hostesses for VIP Guests
  • 4-Tier or Custom Design Wedding Cake
  • Complete After-Party Coordination
  • Shared Album QR Code
  • Mirror Welcome Signage
  • Bridal and Groom Outfit
Enquire Now

Additional services available upon request: Custom Wedding Dress Styling, Destination Wedding Planning, Special Effects and Fireworks, Bridal Party Dressing Coordination.

A Masterpiece

Why Choose Us

The Victoria's Touch
Difference

01

Professional and Reliable

We show up, deliver on time and exceed expectations every single time. Your event is our reputation.

02

Creative Excellence

Every event is a canvas. Fresh, creative ideas tailored precisely to your unique vision and personality.

03

Personal Attention

You are not just a booking. You are our priority. We listen, plan and execute with your satisfaction at heart.

04

Quality Delivery

From the smallest detail to the grandest decor — quality is non-negotiable at Victoria's Touch Enterprise.

05

Passion-Driven Results

We pour passion into every moment, ensuring memories and visuals that last a lifetime.

Get In Touch

Let's Create Something
Extraordinary Together

Ready to start planning your dream event? Reach out and let's turn your vision into reality. We respond within the hour.

We are based in Abuja, Nigeria and serve clients across the country. Reach out via WhatsApp, phone or email — our team responds promptly.

Victoria's Touch Enterprise
Including VT Visuals

A multifaceted creative enterprise blending professionalism with personal touch. Premium event planning, photography, videography and content creation. Based in Abuja, Nigeria.
